name: Iron Cross
instructions: Stand upright holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides with a neutral grip. Your feet should be shoulder-width apart. This is the starting position.

Keeping your arms straight or with a very slight bend at the elbows, raise both arms out to the sides and simultaneously raise them forward so one arm goes up to shoulder height to the front while the other goes to the side, forming a cross shape. Breathe out as you raise.
Lower both arms back to the starting position in a controlled manner while breathing in.
Alternate which arm goes forward and which goes to the side on each repetition.
Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.
